items.title: Wildly low price hits the all new Blink Battery Doorbell 2K+ bundle with five cameras at $167 (60% off)
items.summary: Amazon is now offering the new Blink Battery Doorbell 2K+ bundle with five Outdoor 2K+ cameras for just $166.99 shipped, down from its $420 listed price. That’s a massive 60% discount and arguably the best deal we’ve seen on the new Blink home security package. To put this deal into perspective, the single-camera version of the Battery Doorbell 2K+ bundle is currently selling for around $170 on its own. Meanwhile, the standalone Doorbell 2K+ costs $80, and each Outdoor 2K+ camera typically goes for $90. You’re essentially getting an entire six-piece setup for less than the cost of the smaller bundle at today’s price, so jump in there and snag it while the offer is live.

You’ll find a range of Copilot+ PCs, gaming laptops, and even a handful of RTX 50-series prebuilt gaming PCs included in this sale today, and the prices for these machines start at $299.99 shipped. There’s even an Xbox controller thrown into the mix at $44.99 shipped if you want something to game on your new laptop or PC. Many of these models are down to their best prices yet, so be sure to jump in and snag them after getting more details below.

items.summary: As part of Lectric’s Father’s Day Sale with up to $893 savings, you can currently find the standard XPeak2 Off-Road e-bike getting a $400 bundle of FREE gear and a $100 price cut to $1,399 shipped, while the XPeak2 Long-Range Off-Road e-bike with the same bundle and price cut is down at $1,599 shipped. The e-bikes themselves have been cut down from $1,499 and $1,699, while the full bundled packages would normally cost you $1,899 and $2,099 were it not for the savings on the gear. These are solid options for dads (and anyone else) who enjoy going off the beaten paths, with them both getting accessories that include a rear cargo rack, an Elite headlight, a suspension seat post, a fender set, and water-resistant pannier bags. You can learn more about these e-bikes’ features below, or browse the full Father’s Day Sale lineup here.
